summary: Birthday Card Manual Creation feature complete and working. Backend: 9/9 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified. The Birthday Card tile on More page navigates correctly to /settings/create-birthday-card, the creation form renders with all required fields (photo picker, name, phone, email, custom message, create button), and the public /birthday/{cardId} page renders birthday cards correctly with proper styling.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/birthday/create-manual correctly accepts multipart/form-data with photo file upload
GET /api/birthday/card/{card_id} returns birthday card data with correct fields (card_id, card_type='birthday', customer_name, customer_photo, headline, message, custom_message, style)
Birthday card tile on More page now uses router.push('/settings/create-birthday-card') instead of opening modal
Create birthday card page has pink accent color (#FF6B8A) differentiating it from gold congrats cards
Public birthday card view page renders with confetti decorations, photo, name, message, salesman info, and share options
Share options include: Copy Link, Download, View Card, SMS, Email, Facebook, Twitter, and Create Another Card
seed_data_creation: Test birthday cards created with 'TEST_' prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birthday Card Manual Creation feature verified. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/birthday/create-manual - accepts salesman_id, customer_name, customer_phone (optional), custom_message (optional), photo (required file). (2) GET /api/birthday/card/{card_id} - returns card data for public view. (3) GET /api/birthday/card/{card_id}/image - returns PNG image. (4) POST /api/birthday/card/{card_id}/track - tracks share/download actions. (5) GET /api/birthday/history/{salesman_id} - returns card history. Frontend: /settings/create-birthday-card page cloned from create-congrats.tsx with birthday-specific styling (pink accent #FF6B8A). More page Birthday Card tile navigates to creation page.
mocked_api_note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED. Resend email is REAL.
